horoscope: Your intuition regarding health or work methods is working overtime right now, dear Aries. There can be a special attraction to mysteries and hidden motives, investigations of some kind, and all that we don’t typically see. Today's Lunar Eclipse can produce revelations that have the power to push you forward with less psychological baggage. It's a time to deal with loose ends, looming deadlines, health matters, or scheduling issues. Realizations and reveals prompt you to get going on an exercise or nutrition program that you know you have to do to feel more balanced, or there can be a culmination of a job or work project that gets you to a turning point. Demands can be high, and emotions are strong. You have a good sense that if you stay on top of the demands, you'll be able to make meaningful changes. Still, aim to go slowly and figure out what's in your heart before taking concrete action. There can be a bit of a scramble to get your life into better working order, and the benefits of doing so are great.

The energy of today's Lunar Eclipse can illuminate your feelings, dear Taurus, helping clear a path for more honesty and respect in the future. With Lunar eclipses, new information about old matters comes to light, while another part of your life is downplayed. Emotions may get the better of you today, but if channeled well, they can also motivate you to make important changes and adjustments. Still, take your time with decisions and actions. Relationship issues or even feelings for someone that have been present but not acknowledged or dealt with are likely to surface now, and emotions run high. Revelations or news surrounding romance, children, hobbies, or creative pursuits can occur now and in the coming weeks. Initially, your view of a matter can be highly skewed or magnified, but ultimately, your true feelings about a person, romance, or a project can flood your awareness, and life changes as a result.

There's a stronger focus on your career, public, life direction, or reputation matters for you at this time of year, dear Gemini. If you feel a little out of balance, your best bet is to slow down and avoid acting on impulses, but do pay attention to prompts and reveals happening this week. Today's Lunar Eclipse in your home and family sector inspires realizations or epiphanies. Feelings that you've kept at bay or haven't yet acknowledged are impossible to ignore now! Events and revelations clear the path for improvements in your life, particularly related to career, reputation, status, home, and family. Home repairs, family dramas, or internal changes are possible, and you're in a position to balance out your attention to outside responsibilities and your personal life. If you've been overextending yourself, you'll now find ways to get more downtime. The demands of your personal life call out to you now. Unrest in the family circle or around the home is temporary. Aim to take the time to take care of your feelings of security or safety.

Emotions run high today with a Lunar Eclipse in your communications and transportation sector, dear Cancer, although a lot of this energy can be on a mental level. Feelings and events can lead to important discoveries, ideas, and changes in your mindset or attitude. Watch for impulsive self-expression, but give weight to your emotions and to any new feelings you're experiencing now. There can be a sudden rush to handle your daily affairs after perhaps excessive attention to everything else! A change of plans might prompt a scuffle of activity. Themes related to travel, belief systems, communications, transportation, and making connections are big now and the weeks ahead, and today's eclipse reminds you to connect with your true feelings about what you're learning, communicating, and sharing. This is certainly a time when facts are important to you, and they can help you refine your beliefs. Aim to sit with any epiphany about your projects, interests, and connections, and later, when you feel more settled, aim to act on your feelings.

As you go a little more deeply into your pursuits these days, dear Leo, you may need to find moments to come up for air. Today's Lunar Eclipse can serve as a reminder to pay some attention to your practical affairs! Heightened emotions surrounding money and possessions, as well as personal values and talents, can be a theme now. You're addressing feelings that will ultimately lead to changes and improvements that will help you build a stronger sense of security, predictability, and safety. You can have a revelation about money or business, or deal with matters related to your values and self-worth or boundaries in a relationship. Realizations about how to better handle or manage your money can occur now. Take your time before making any pivotal decisions, but aim to examine the feelings that are coming to the surface, however raw they may be at the moment.

A Lunar Eclipse occurs in your sign today, dear Virgo, prompting an emotional awakening this week. The truth you face now is about something that's been with you for some time but that you haven't yet acknowledged or fully noticed. Emotions run high, especially around a personal matter or close relationship, and even amid all the emotional excitement, you can feel energetically drained. A Lunar Eclipse has the effect of a super-charged Full Moon. It can bring about a significant revelation about your feelings for someone, your image, or your personal impact. Events or epiphanies happening now stir a desire to make big changes related to your sense of independence. These feelings are real, but because sudden urges and desires may be more about internal unrest than emotional truth, it makes sense to take more time to arrive at conclusions. As well, lunar eclipses magnify one area of life while downplaying another, and objectivity is temporarily lacking.

Today's Lunar Eclipse can pressure you to find a balance if you've been working too hard, dear Libra. A work or health matter can come to a head, but it's also a time to put more effort and energy into your emotional wellness. Disruptions to your routine may force you to step away from the daily grind. Aim to deal head-on with whatever comes your way. This eclipse can prompt a stronger need for rest, reflection, or time alone. Watch for speaking about a matter too soon as the Lunar Eclipse occurs in your privacy sector, and Mercury is retrograde. Feelings about a past issue become undeniable, or a previously hidden or secret matter is unearthed. You might embrace or let go of a situation, relationship, or powerful feeling, but it makes sense to take a step back and reevaluate before taking action. This eclipse ultimately reminds you of the importance of taking time to recoup, balancing attention to your physical health with the care of your emotional health, as well as balancing your attention to work and procedure with the need for rest.

Feelings are strong and guiding you today, dear Scorpio, with a Lunar Eclipse occurring in your solar eleventh house. This influences your social life, children, love affairs, group associations, and friends. Your feelings about someone, a relationship, or your social life, in general, can be pivotal now, reaching a turning point. You might also come to powerful realizations about long-term happiness goals. You might need to come to a friend's aid, or a buried problem in a relationship can come to light now and demand attention. This eclipse can feel intense, and it could pull problem areas that have been brewing to the foreground. Ultimately, clearing the air helps you make better choices. You're bound to get to a better position to understand what and who you want once the impatience or frustration of the moment passes. Aim to feel, experience, and take in, but to act on all of this later! Events occurring now and this week tend to push you in the right direction, perhaps along a more authentic path. You need this background to make meaningful choices later, but consider that it's best to sit with your feelings for a while to get there.

Emotions heighten today with a Lunar Eclipse, dear Sagittarius. It's like a super-charged Full Moon, affecting your life for many months, and it's likely to push recognition or awards or even a change in your career path. You become especially aware of your responsibilities, ambitions, and goals. A project can come to fruition, or those things you've swept under the carpet demand attention now and in the coming weeks. There's a stronger focus on home and family or your private world these days, and now your responsibilities to the outside world call. You'll have more time to sort out the delicate homework balance over the coming year, but you're still getting prompts to keep sorting it out. Unrest with work, bosses, or your long-term goals and current path to reaching them is stirred by this eclipse, and changes may be imminent! While this eclipse can illuminate a matter related to your career or a major life goal, it’s also temporarily hiding or downplaying some information. As such, listen to your feelings but wait to make judgments.

Today's Lunar Eclipse challenges you to confront previously buried issues in your life, dear Capricorn, particularly related to your ideas and beliefs. It's a powerful time to discover your feelings on a matter, but you may need to let everything sink in before reaching conclusions. Taking control of your life requires time and energy, so resolve to make changes, but avoid pushing for immediate results. Make room for the possibility of real breakthroughs in your thinking. This eclipse generates a lot of emotional and mental energy, and focusing it all can be difficult. Commitments to travel, belief systems, publishing, or learning endeavors may come up for inspection in the weeks ahead. This eclipse also prompts you to fit more special activities into your life--it's a time for expanding your skills and knowledge. Consider that jumping into action isn’t the best choice around an eclipse. While you should give weight to your feelings and epiphanies now, take your time with decision-making for the best results.

Emotions often dominate today, dear Aquarius, with a Lunar Eclipse producing a turning point, realization, or epiphany surrounding financial, ownership, intimate, or sharing matters. Now and in the coming weeks, there may be activities involving financial support, taxes, debts, investments, or a close relationship and its power dynamics or trust issues. Money is coming into your life, or you need to shuffle around your finances to accommodate changes. This eclipse brings buried or long-brewing situations to a head or the surface. You might settle or make changes in the ways you depend on others. While resolutions may not come just yet, events and realizations can get the ball rolling. Divvying up shared resources can be in focus. Right now, aim to manage inflated feelings about a person, relationship, or situation.

With today's Lunar Eclipse in your opposite sign, dear Pisces, your attention turns to the perspective, agenda, or needs of a significant other. While there has been a larger focus on your personal plans, the energy of this eclipse helps balance things out. Relationship issues could come to light. There can be significant discoveries or epiphanies about your feelings or about a close relationship. In truth, you could feel temporarily drained or overwhelmed, and while you should listen to your feelings, it's not the time to take action on them. Ultimately, epiphanies about a significant relationship can lead to substantial changes. Events over the next while will help you define your life concerning your partnership needs. Today is about getting in touch with what's in your heart. While events now are highly revealing, take time to sort through whatever comes to light. As you advance, it can be a time of increased invitations or social engagements, relationship drama, new clients, or other circumstances that get you more involved with others.
